data.title: UAE Issues Missile Warning as Rising Tensions Risk US-Iran Truce
data.description: The US and Iran exchanged fire in the Persian Gulf in a flareup of violence on Monday that also drew in the United Arab Emirates, casting doubt on the fate of a four-week ceasefire.
data.keywords: Iran,Persian Gulf,United Arab Emirates,Donald John Trump,Generic 1st 'CL' Future,Social Media,War,Israel,Military,Tehran,world,politics,markets
